build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ../calcpad-web/dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; .\local-npm.ps1 --prefix ../calcpad-frontend run build; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath powershell -ArgumentList '-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File local-npm.ps1 --prefix ../calcpad-frontend run watch'; .\local-npm.ps1 --prefix ../calcpad-web run build:watch }"
build.beforeBuildCommand: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force ../calcpad-web/dist -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; .\local-npm.ps1 --prefix ../calcpad-frontend run build; .\local-npm.ps1 --prefix ../calcpad-web run build }"

args: if ($env:CALCPAD_SIGN_THUMBPRINT) { signtool sign /sha1 $env:CALCPAD_SIGN_THUMBPRINT /fd sha256 /tr http://timestamp.digicert.com /td sha256 '{{ %1 }}' }
